questions.question_text_full: Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease is caused by duplication of the peripheral myelin protein-22 (PMP22) gene on which chromosome?
questions.notes: The options were labeled a, b, c, d in the source, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Which portal allowed stakeholders seamless access to information related to funding, documentation, project monitoring, and approval through four efficient ways of logging in for monitoring the implementation of Centrally Sponsored Schemes in 2023?
questions.notes: Only two options are visible on the page.
